changesProposed.name: NuScale Power

verified.name: NuScale Power
verified.description: NuScale Power designs and markets small modular reactors (SMRs). The company received NRC Standard Design Approval for its 77 MWe module design in May 2025 and is pursuing commercialization through partnerships including a 6-GW program with TVA and ENTRA1 Energy.
verified.notes: Company went public in May 2022 via SPAC merger with Spring Valley Acquisition Corp, trading as NYSE: SMR. In September 2022, entered into alliance with ENTRA1 Energy; by May 2025, ENTRA1 held global exclusive rights to commercialization and deployment of NuScale SMRs. Company is now focused on SMR module production rather than entire power plant development.

verified.name: Planet Labs PBC
verified.description: American Earth imaging company that designs and manufactures miniature satellites called Doves to image the entirety of the Earth daily. Provides satellite-based Earth observation data for climate monitoring, agriculture, urban planning, and disaster response.
verified.notes: Company formerly known as Cosmogia, Inc. and Planet Labs, Inc. Became publicly traded on December 8, 2021 via SPAC merger with DMY Technology Group Inc IV.
